Appearances:
Plaintiff The Tides Center is present. Represented by Douglas Gary.
Attorney Michael Rossoff appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Erin Kenyon is present.
Attorney Laura Chiera representing the defendant through full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Mark Schreiber, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of APR-23-2012 is vacated.
